description: BHVO-2 (USGS Hawaiian basalt) LIBS spectra from three independent publicly-accessible sources: NASA MSL ChemCam pre-flight calibration, CSA Planetary LIBS open dataset, and NASA Mars 2020 SuperCam pre-flight calibration.
n_shots_per_sample_note: 15 shots (SuperCam 1545mm), 30 shots (SuperCam 4250mm), 200 shots (CSA 200avg), 1000 shots (CSA 1000avg), ~30 shots (ChemCam per Clegg 2017 protocol). Each CSV is a mean-averaged spectrum over all shots at one raster location.

sources.label: chemcam
sources.instrument: ChemCam LIBS (MSL Curiosity rover, pre-flight); Nd:YAG 1064 nm pulsed laser, ~10 mJ/pulse, 3 m standoff, 7 Torr CO2 atmosphere (cleanroom sim), echelle spectrometer 240-905 nm

sources.label: csa
sources.instrument: CSA LIBS instrument; Nd:YAG 1064 nm; ambient air atmosphere; spectrometer range 198-970 nm
sources.intensity_units: ADU (arbitrary, dark-subtracted; positive region is calibrated signal)
sources.license: Government of Canada Open Government Licence v2.0
sources.citation: Canadian Space Agency (2017). LIBS dataset for materials for Planetary Exploration. Government of Canada Open Data. UUID: 137bdc17-2f46-4d70-98e7-acc46f602e9f

sources.label: supercam_1545mm
sources.instrument: SuperCam LIBS (Mars 2020 Perseverance rover, pre-flight FM calibration); Nd:YAG 532 nm, ~10 mJ/pulse, 1545 mm standoff, ambient lab atmosphere; 7933-pixel echelle LIBS detector 244-853 nm; 15 shots averaged per location
sources.intensity_units: detector digital numbers (DN), dark-subtracted, not radiometrically calibrated

sources.label: supercam_4250mm
sources.instrument: SuperCam LIBS (Mars 2020 Perseverance rover, pre-flight FM calibration); Nd:YAG 532 nm, ~10 mJ/pulse, 4250 mm standoff, ambient lab atmosphere; 7933-pixel echelle LIBS detector 244-853 nm; 30 shots averaged per location
sources.intensity_units: detector digital numbers (DN), dark-subtracted, not radiometrically calibrated

certified_composition_reference: Jochum et al. 2005 GeoReM; USGS Reference Materials Program (https://crustal.usgs.gov/geochemical_reference_standards/)
